channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-21 02:38 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: “That first signature resembled my actual, physical handwriting.”
item.description: “That first signature resembled my actual, physical handwriting.”

item.title: @elonmusk: No, I want to enable anyone to go to the Moon or Mars so that we secure the future of consciousness
item.description: No, I want to enable anyone to go to the Moon or Mars so that we secure the future of consciousness

item.title: @elonmusk: HUGE NEWS!!!! Suicidal Empathy is the Instant #1 New York Times Bestseller in the Nonfiction Hardcov...
item.description: HUGE NEWS!!!! Suicidal Empathy is the Instant #1 New York Times Bestseller in the Nonfiction Hardcover category and in the Combined (print and ebook) category!

item.title: @elonmusk: Data centers aren’t stealing your water. Even if the total water draw of data centers triples by 203...
item.description: Data centers aren’t stealing your water. Even if the total water draw of data centers triples by 2030, they’d require just 8% of the water consumed by American golf courses.@dodgeblakeinterviewed@AndyMasley, the man who’s been debunking AI water doomerism. Full story 👇

item.title: @elonmusk: We just added Grok's new imagine model in Paper so you can explore images even faster. Here's what w...
item.description: We just added Grok's new imagine model in Paper so you can explore images even faster. Here's what we found: - Super fast generations for the quality - Saves details when editing - Perfect for 30 rapid experiments or chains of edit prompts Available today, check it out!

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX Starship is a work of art
item.description: SpaceX Starship is a work of art

item.title: @elonmusk: Lithuania becomes second European country to approve FSD Supervised
item.description: Lithuania becomes second European country to approve FSD Supervised

item.title: @elonmusk: One great thing about spaceflight is that the scenic route is often the fastest path to where you’re...
item.description: One great thing about spaceflight is that the scenic route is often the fastest path to where you’re going. Also great to see the Psyche spacecraft healthy and enjoying its journey to the 16 Psyche asteroid (launched on Falcon Heavy in Oct 2023, arrives summer 2029). Can’t wait to see what a $10 quadrillion asteroid looks like 🤩

item.title: @elonmusk: You don't realize how massive Starship actually is. The engineering is absolutely insane
item.description: You don't realize how massive Starship actually is. The engineering is absolutely insane

item.title: @elonmusk: S & X will forever be in my heart
item.description: S & X will forever be in my heart

item.title: @elonmusk: About to hand over the last Model S & X cars ever made
item.description: About to hand over the last Model S & X cars ever made
